mechanics.excerpt: If you choose to roll twice and roll another 12, ignore that result and roll again until you get different result: Event Options Generating random events adds a element of uncertainty to the character creation process It can be fun have the unexpected occur in your character's life_ and even unpleasant unlucky events are guaranteed add interesting flavor: However; the players and gamemaster agree_ you have few 24
